It provides automatic fallback, token savings (up to 40% RTK), and avoids usage limits. The project is written in JavaScript, has 4,058 stars and 942 forks.

title: Oracle 裁员裁到大动脉了？官方软件 Oacle SQL Developer 居然出现恶性 BUG 了。
content: A user reports a critical bug in Oracle SQL Developer 24.3.1 on Windows. When exporting data from a table containing a column named “REMARK”, the column name disappears in the generated INSERT statement, leaving a double comma between “REGISTED” and “PROJECT_ID”. The issue occurs while exporting only data (not structure) and is reproducible on Oracle Database 11g. The current official download remains the same version.

title: 斯托克的陶工们正深陷成本泥潭，这正严重拖累英国制造业
content: Stoke-on-Trent potters face severe cost pressures that are hampering UK manufacturing. Rising expenses across the industry are dragging down production and profitability, making it difficult for local artisans and factories to compete. These financial challenges threaten the region’s traditional pottery sector and could negatively impact the broader UK manufacturing landscape.

title: 杨植麟现身后，Kimi又融资140亿
content: Kimi, a Chinese AI startup, is about to raise $2 billion (≈¥140 bn) in a new round led by Meituan’s Longju, bringing its post‑money valuation above $20 billion (≈¥140 bn). The company has now raised over ¥376 bn and its annual recurring revenue surpassed $100 m, driven by paid subscriptions and API usage. Kimi’s K2.6 model— a 1‑trillion‑parameter MoE system— outperforms competing closed‑source models and supports long‑term coding and agent clusters. The funding marks a major milestone for China’s largest‑financed large‑model firm.

title: 他用DeepSeek-V4手搓Agent，冲上GitHub热榜第一
content: DeepSeek‑TUI, an open‑source terminal AI agent built on DeepSeek‑V4, surged to GitHub’s top list with 10.2k stars. Developed by non‑programmer Hunter Bown, it lets users chat, edit files, run shell commands, and manage Git directly in a terminal UI, supporting sub‑agents, LLM inference, and extensive tool integration. The project features automated mode selection, multi‑level reasoning, real‑time LLM streaming, and long‑context handling, appealing to developers seeking low‑cost, customizable AI coding workflows.

title: 伊朗石油危机导致供应受阻，亚洲遭遇“塑料冲击”
content: Iran’s oil crisis is strangling supply, creating a “plastic shock” across Asia as short‑term shortages drive demand for alternative materials. The disruption has prompted grain traders to pull back from already over‑saturated markets, while higher petrol prices are slowing new vehicle registrations in China and other countries. The crisis underscores Indonesia’s dependence on imported oil, as its market is set to experience a significant surge in oil import demand.

title: 黄仁勋：中国不应获得英伟达最先进晶片 美应保持 AI 领先
content: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang said China should not have access to the company’s most advanced chips. He argued the United States must preserve its leadership in artificial intelligence and that a competitive tech environment helps maximize exports. He added that higher taxes could enhance economic and national security.

title: Stop Letting AI Write Your Database Migrations
content: AI-generated database migrations lack context about traffic, locking, and deployment, leading to costly production failures. A simple column addition can lock entire tables, cause timeouts, and introduce data corruption if executed without careful staging. Human‑crafted migrations add columns as nullable, set defaults, update data in batches, and apply NOT NULL later—reducing lock time and avoiding downtime. Use AI only for drafting, then rigorously review and test migrations on realistic datasets before deployment.
eventKey: stop-letting-write-your-database-migrations
normalizedTitle: stop letting ai write your database migrations
